description:
Three-axis structural pass on ir_codegen.rs following fz-cg2:

EXTRACT (large functions still too long)
- emit_terminator: ~950-line Term match from compile_fn block loop -> free function
- lower_collection_prim: ~235 lines of collection Prim variants from lower_prim -> free function

CONSOLIDATE (repeated pattern)
- try_typed_fast_path: typed float/int early-return checks before emit_dispatch_binop
  repeat identically in BinOp arithmetic and comparison arms

REMOVE (compiler-confirmed dead code)
- CompiledModule fields never read: module, schemas, types
- CompiledModule methods never used: static_closure_targets, schema_for, run, run_in, run_internal
- Free function join_return_descrs (dead outside test cfg)
- Double #[cfg(test)] at line ~6089

DAG: all four tickets are independent.
title: fz-cg3 [EPIC] codegen: extract terminator dispatch, split lower_prim, remove dead code
